name: Teriyaki Potatoes (Microwave)
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Margarine or butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the potatoes and scrub thoroughly with a vegetable brush.
2. Cut tiny new potatoes into quarters or medium red potatoes into 1-inch pieces.
3. Place the potatoes in a 1.5-quart microwave-safe casserole dish.
4. Add margarine/butter, teriyaki sauce, garlic salt, Italian seasoning, and ground black pepper.
5. Toss to combine. Cover with a lid or microwave-safe cover.
6. Cook on 100% power (high) for 12 to 15 minutes (14 to 16 minutes for low-wattage ovens), stirring twice during cooking.
7. Stir before serving. Garnish with fresh rosemary if desired and serve with sour cream, if desired.
8. Makes 5 side dish servings.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
Source: Karen Winchell of Fort Collins, CO; BH&G (2/94)
:: MM by Sue Woodward
